name: Harmony Design System — shadcn/ui + Tailwind + Radix
description: Harmony Design System for AI consumers — React components on shadcn/ui patterns, Tailwind, and Radix

Colors.userDecision: AI-first Approach A: single token source = CSS variables in tokens.css + one Tailwind preset → those vars + HarmonyThemeProvider. No JSON token export. Product is choose-once via defaultProduct for apps; demo may switch for review. Human accepted foundation-2 PASS.
Colors.notes: Token source: packages/ui/src/styles/tokens.css + globals.css (Tailwind v4 @theme, no preset) + theme/index.tsx. Fonts bundled in styles/fonts + fonts.css.

Typography.notes: Type scale via CSS variables + Tailwind. Human accepted foundation-2 PASS.

Spacing.notes: Spacing/radius via CSS variables + Tailwind. Human accepted foundation-2 PASS.

Elevations.notes: Shadow/elevation via CSS variables + Tailwind. Human accepted foundation-2 PASS.

gaps: Live Ask Dela panel demo deferred until RightSidebar + ShellPanel
Panel Usage, AI Guidelines, Accessibility sections deferred (shell phase)
Dela.userDecision: component Dela brand scope: CSS vars in tokens.css + Tailwind bg-dela / text-dela-foreground; CTA via existing Button dela/dela-pill (no DelaButton). Demo /foundation/dela mirrors react-mui brand+tokens inventory. Shell panel sections deferred. See plans/Dela.md. Human accepted Dela-1 PASS via plan execute (2026-07-18).
Dela.notes: Brand/foundation demo at /foundation/dela. Verifier PASS Dela-1; shell panel deferred.

skippedProps: runtime theme detection (theme-* MutationObserver) — replaced by composition
gaps: No runtime product switching in the library; product surface is chosen by composition
ShellLayout.userDecision: component ShellLayout: thin prop-driven grid frame with slot props (header/leftSidebar/rightSidebar/footer/floatingNav/leftPanel/rightPanel + children). Grid derives from slot presence; productVariant only tunes spacing (cp vs standard). Zero theme detection — composition, not runtime switching. See plans/shell.md.
ShellLayout.notes: Package layout + demo /shell/layout (CP + standard compositions). Rendered clean; shell-1 capture.

Button.userDecision: component Button: shadcn-style cva + Tailwind tokens + package Icon + inline loading spinner; full prop parity (xs, vertical, dela, pageHeader, href); Radix Slot asChild optional. Harmony variants kept (not stock shadcn default/destructive-only API). Consumer API: ButtonHTMLAttributes / AnchorHTMLAttributes events; href→a; asChild→Slot; export buttonVariants. See plans/consumer-api-existing.md + docs/components/Button.md.
Button.notes: Package Button: cva + Tailwind tokens; full prop parity; demo at /components/buttons. Verifier PASS Button-1; human accepted visual match (2026-07-18).

ButtonGroup.userDecision: component ButtonGroup: shadcn Button Group; default strips child borders; data-variant on Button; horizontal stacks full-width max-md; buttonGroupVariants. Remediations 2026-07-19.
ButtonGroup.notes: Package + demo; border/responsive/hover/disabled remediations. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-19).

Input.userDecision: component Input hybrid: bare Input (no label/labelVariant); error/errorMessage/icon/trailingIcon/trailing; InputField convenience. Consumer API signed off hybrid plan 2026-07-20.
Input.notes: Package + demo /components/inputs. Hybrid with Field + InputField. 2026-07-21: geometry driven by semantic --field-* tokens (height/padding-x/radius/font/icon-gutter) + max-md responsive padding; CP compact density via product token block; label orientation token-driven (Field orientation=auto), no product JS branching.

Textarea.userDecision: component Textarea hybrid: bare Textarea (no label; no error API — reference parity); TextareaField convenience. Consumer API signed off hybrid plan 2026-07-20.
Textarea.notes: Package + demo on /components/inputs. 2026-07-21: --field-* tokens (padding-x/radius/font + --field-textarea-* min-height/padding-y) + max-md responsive padding; CP compact density via product token block.

NumberInput.userDecision: component NumberInput: steppers via Button+Icon; value/onChange number API; NumberField convenience; no built-in label. Consumer API signed off hybrid plan 2026-07-20.
NumberInput.notes: Package + demo /components/specialty-inputs. 2026-07-21: input + square steppers sized from --field-height; wrapper --field-radius; CP compact density via product token block.

RangeInput.userDecision: component RangeInput: Radix Slider; showPercent/prefix/suffix; RangeField convenience; no built-in label. Consumer API signed off hybrid plan 2026-07-20.
RangeInput.notes: Package + demo /components/specialty-inputs. Date/Time section now live via DateInput. 2026-07-21: slider (track/thumb) has no boxed-field geometry; no --field-* changes; RangeField label orientation token-driven (auto).

Checkbox.userDecision: component Checkbox Hybrid C: bare Radix Checkbox (no label) + CheckboxField; Icon check indicator; validation props. Consumer API per plans/selection-tooltip-link.md 2026-07-20. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-20).

CheckboxGroup.userDecision: component CheckboxGroup fieldset shell; orientation; group validation; children Checkbox/CheckboxField. Consumer API per plans/selection-tooltip-link.md 2026-07-20. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-20).

RadioButton.userDecision: component RadioButton Hybrid C: Radix item (no label) + RadioField; sizes sm|md|lg; CSS dot. Consumer API per plans/selection-tooltip-link.md 2026-07-20. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-20).

RadioGroup.userDecision: component RadioGroup Radix root + fieldset; name propagation (stack win vs Astro); legend/orientation/validation. Consumer API per plans/selection-tooltip-link.md 2026-07-20. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-20).

gaps: variant=segmented + optionLabelLeft/Right — callout on toggle-switches demo
Toggle.userDecision: component Toggle: Radix Switch + ToggleField Hybrid C (no label on bare); size sm|md; skip segmented. Consumer API per plans/toggle-dropdown-accordion.md 2026-07-20.

gaps: DateRangePicker / DateRangePickerExpanded internal — callout on date-picker demo
DateInput.userDecision: component DateInput hybrid: bare DateInput (no label props) + DateInputField; onChange(string); types date|time|datetime-local|month|week; Popover + panels. Calendar alias of DatePicker. Consumer API per plans/date-time-inputs.md 2026-07-20.
DateInput.notes: Package + demo /components/date-picker and specialty Date/Time. Verifier PASS DateInput-2; synced after execute + PASS (2026-07-20). 2026-07-21: composes Input so inherits --field-* geometry/density automatically; DateInputField label orientation token-driven (auto).

Label.userDecision: component Label hybrid: Label + Field/FieldLabel/FieldDescription/FieldError; htmlFor (not for); required/helper. Prefer Field composition; *Field convenience on controls. Consumer API signed off hybrid plan 2026-07-20.

Avatar.userDecision: component Avatar: shadcn Avatar + Image/Fallback exports; convenience variant icon|initials|image; interactive button; omit AvatarGroup/AvatarBadge. avatarVariants. Consumer API approved batch 2026-07-18.
Avatar.notes: Package + demo /components/avatar. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-19).

Card.userDecision: component Card: shadcn compound CardHeader/Title/Description/Action/Content/Footer + cardVariants; Harmony elevated|interactive|primary; convenience title/description when not composing CardHeader (compound wins); header actions via CardAction + Button/Icon (no Astro icon1/2/3); asChild on root. Consumer API dual-path approved 2026-07-20. See plans/cards-dialogs.md + docs/components/Card.md.
Card.notes: Package + demo /components/cards. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-20).

Badge.userDecision: component Badge: shadcn Badge + cva; sizes sm|md|lg (Astro small/medium/large); default lg; icon via Icon; badgeVariants. Demo chrome uses Badge via demoStatusBadge. Consumer API approved batch 2026-07-18.
Badge.notes: Package + demo /components/badges + demo chrome. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-19).

NotificationBadge.userDecision: component NotificationBadge: children wrap anchor for auto top-right (AI-friendly); standalone without children; type/size/variant/value/border; notificationBadgeVariants. Consumer API delta 2026-07-19.
NotificationBadge.notes: Package + demo; children wrap API (AI-friendly). Human accepted visual match (2026-07-19).

gaps: Static hover/focused/pressed docs states omitted (CSS pseudo)
Chip.userDecision: component Chip: cva (no stock Chip); fill|outline; types chip|dots|overflow; removable/onRemove; omit legacy selected and static state props. chipVariants. Consumer API approved batch 2026-07-18.
Chip.notes: Package + demo /components/chips. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-19).

Alert.userDecision: component Alert: shadcn Alert + AlertTitle/Description/Action; appearance default|enhanced (not style); compose Icon/Button/ProgressBar; onDismiss controlled; primaryAction/secondaryAction. alertVariants. Consumer API approved batch 2026-07-18. ProgressBar implemented first in batch.
Alert.notes: Package + demo /components/alerts. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-19).

gaps: cornerVariant — no Radix Tooltip sharp-corner analog (demo callout)
Tooltip.userDecision: component Tooltip Radix/shadcn compound; text + position→side; skip cornerVariant. Consumer API per plans/selection-tooltip-link.md 2026-07-20. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-20).

Spinner.userDecision: component Spinner: stock shadcn Spinner pattern; default Harmony CSS border ring (not Lucide); size sm|md|lg; optional icon via package Icon (replaces ring); role=status aria-label Loading; span root + HTML attrs/ref. Button dual patterns: keep loading+private SVG; also nest Spinner as children when loading false. Consumer API signed off 2026-07-18. See plans/Spinner.md + docs/components/Spinner.md.
Spinner.notes: Package Spinner: border ring + optional Icon override; demo at /components/spinner. Verifier PASS Spinner-1; human accepted visual match (2026-07-18).

ProgressBar.userDecision: component ProgressBar: shadcn Progress / Radix; value/max/size sm|md|lg/variant/showLabel; progressBarVariants; full size parity. Consumer API approved in status-components batch plan 2026-07-18.
ProgressBar.notes: Package + demo /components/progress-bar. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-19).

Icon.userDecision: component Icon export: Tailwind+cva sizes via --icon-* tokens; resolve manifest→Heroicons→Tabler→custom public SVG→fallback; no Lucide remap; product from HarmonyThemeProvider for manifest lookup. Consumer API: presentational (no click API); name/size/variant/product/className; wrap parent for interaction. See plans/consumer-api-existing.md + docs/components/Icon.md.
Icon.notes: Package Icon: manifest→Heroicons→Tabler→custom SVG; cva sizes via --icon-* tokens. Demo at /components/icons. Verifier PASS iteration 1; human accepted visual match (2026-07-18).

gaps: Astro tabs[] array / named content slots / custom DOM events -> Radix Tabs compound (TabsTrigger/TabsContent), actions slot, TabsAddButton, React callbacks
overflow auto/manual -> useTabOverflow hook + composed DropdownMenu (or overflow=scroll)
TabStrip.userDecision: component Tabs/TabsList/TabsTrigger/TabsContent (+TabsAddButton, useTabOverflow) on @radix-ui/react-tabs; composition-first full parity: variant default|compact|pill (pill VP-only), iconPosition, per-tab actions slot, add-tab, overflow scroll + auto menu; kebab/overflow via new DropdownMenu (@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu) inlining Select tokens (no shared module, no Select refactor). Consumer API per plans/tabstrip.md 2026-07-20.
TabStrip.notes: Implemented package (tabs + dropdown-menu) + demo (12 sections) + docs; human accepted visual match 2026-07-20. shadcn-AI ergonomics pass: TabsTrigger supports icon-as-child + asChild; overflow narrowed to none|scroll (auto menu via useTabOverflow).

gaps: Astro data-* init script (linear auto-disable, auto-numbering, connector activation) -> React context/clone
stepper:step-clicked event -> onStepClick(index); slot=description -> description prop
Stepper.userDecision: component Stepper/Step custom compound (no Radix); cva state variants + tokens; Stepper clones Step children to inject index/state; activeStep/orientation/nonLinear/onStepClick; Step completed/disabled/error/warning/success/icon/description. Consumer API per plans/stepper.md 2026-07-20.
Stepper.notes: Implemented package + demo (7 sections) + docs; human accepted visual match 2026-07-20.

Step.userDecision: component Step: sub-component of Stepper, planned/shipped together. Consumer API per plans/stepper.md 2026-07-20.
Step.notes: Shipped with Stepper; human accepted visual match 2026-07-20.

FloatingNav.userDecision: component FloatingNav: CP action toolbar (Execute/Actions/Refresh/Save/pin) with variant full|compact, showExecute, saveDisabled, React callbacks (onExecute/onSave/…), and an actions slot override. See plans/shell.md.
FloatingNav.notes: Package layout + demo /cp/floating-nav. Rendered clean; shell-1 capture. 2026-07-21: surfaced in the demo sidebar via the product-driven 'CP Components' section (demoThemeConfig.components + DemoShell), reproducing the reference's runtime theme nav. This demo-chrome product switching is intended and separate from the packages' 'composition, not runtime switching' decision (which governs delivered packages only).

gaps: responsive default size <768px when no size class — always explicit size (default md)
Link.userDecision: component Link cva <a>; size/muted/external+Icon; asChild; skip Astro responsive default size. Consumer API per plans/selection-tooltip-link.md 2026-07-20. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-20).

skippedProps: runtime theme-* variant visibility (all variants rendered) — replaced by variant prop
gaps: shadcn sidebar block not used — hover-expand icon rail is not a fit; custom rail on Harmony tokens (documented)
LeftSidebar.userDecision: component LeftSidebar: hover-expand icon rail with default sections per variant (cp/vp/ppm/maconomy) or custom sections; controlled activeId + onItemSelect for panel wiring; expanded/panelOpen flags. Custom (not shadcn Sidebar block) per plans/shell.md.
LeftSidebar.notes: Package layout + demo /shell/left-sidebar. Rendered clean; shell-1 capture.

skippedProps: runtime theme-* variant visibility (all variants rendered) — replaced by variant prop
gaps: shadcn sidebar block not used — hover-expand icon rail is not a fit; custom rail on Harmony tokens (documented)
RightSidebar.userDecision: component RightSidebar: mirror of LeftSidebar on the right edge; every variant starts with the Dela AI item (default/active logo swap + gradient tile when active); controlled activeId + onItemSelect. Custom (not shadcn Sidebar block) per plans/shell.md.
RightSidebar.notes: Package layout + demo /shell/right-sidebar. Dela active state verified; shell-1 capture.

ShellPageHeader.userDecision: component ShellPageHeader: title/subtitle + outlineButtons[] then primaryButton (package Button, buttonType=pageHeader) or full actions override. See plans/shell.md.
ShellPageHeader.notes: Package layout + demo /shell/page-header. Rendered clean; shell-1 capture.

gaps: shadcn Sheet (modal overlay) not used — panel is non-modal inline; custom drawer (documented)
ShellPanel.userDecision: component ShellPanel: non-modal inline drawer, side left|right, controlled open/onOpenChange, theme|default header, narrow|full width (user-toggleable), gradientHeader for Dela, showClose/showPopout. Custom (not shadcn Sheet) per plans/shell.md.
ShellPanel.notes: Package layout + demo /shell/panel (right wired to sidebar, left default header). shell-1 capture.

ShellFooter.userDecision: component ShellFooter: composes package Tabs on a dark bar; tabs[] + value/onValueChange + showAddButton + variant default|compact; active tab pinned with primary underline. See plans/shell.md.
ShellFooter.notes: Package layout + demo /shell/footer. Active pin + underline verified; shell-1 capture.

ShellHeader.userDecision: component ShellHeader: brand (logo+productName) + company picker (controlled dropdown, indicator + gradient bar reflect selection) + Avatar; companies/companyColor props; actions slot override. See plans/shell.md.
ShellHeader.notes: Package layout + demo /shell/header. Company picker + gradient verified; shell-1 capture.

gaps: resizable — no Radix Dialog resize analog; drag-to-resize omitted (demo callout)
Dialog.userDecision: component Dialog: @radix-ui/react-dialog shadcn compound (Trigger/Content/Header/Title/Description/Body/Footer/Close); Harmony DialogHeader variant default|primary; DialogFooter buttonAlignment + convenience confirmLabel/onConfirm/cancelLabel/onCancel/tertiary (children win); Icon x-mark close; Radix open/onOpenChange (no openDialog globals). Skip resizable. Consumer API dual-path approved 2026-07-20. See plans/cards-dialogs.md + docs/components/Dialog.md.
Dialog.notes: Package + demo /components/dialogs. Positioning + close X + elevated shadow remediations. Human accepted visual match (2026-07-20).

gaps: Astro options[] / trigger / option-* slots — SelectItem children + SelectField instead; callout on dropdowns demo
Dropdown.userDecision: component Dropdown→Select: Radix Select compound + SelectField hybrid labels; SelectItem children (no options[]); Icon chevron-down. Consumer API per plans/toggle-dropdown-accordion.md 2026-07-20.
Dropdown.notes: 2026-07-21: SelectTrigger geometry from --field-* tokens (height/radius/padding-x/font) + max-md responsive padding; CP compact density via product token block; SelectField label orientation token-driven (auto).

gaps: Astro items[] / item-* slots / label prop — compound Accordion + external group label; callout on accordion demo
Accordion.userDecision: component Accordion: Radix compound Accordion/Item/Trigger/Content; type single|multiple (maps allowMultiple); no items[]; Icon chevron-down. Consumer API per plans/toggle-dropdown-accordion.md 2026-07-20.

DatePicker.userDecision: component DatePicker / Calendar alias: react-day-picker + Harmony tokens; value/onSelect YYYY-MM-DD. Consumer API per plans/date-time-inputs.md 2026-07-20.
DatePicker.notes: Verifier PASS DateInput-2; synced after execute + PASS (2026-07-20).

DateTimePicker.userDecision: component DateTimePicker: DatePicker + TimePicker; onSelect when both set. Consumer API per plans/date-time-inputs.md 2026-07-20.
DateTimePicker.notes: Verifier PASS DateInput-2; synced after execute + PASS (2026-07-20).

MonthPicker.userDecision: component MonthPicker: year nav + month grid; YYYY-MM onSelect. Consumer API per plans/date-time-inputs.md 2026-07-20.
MonthPicker.notes: Verifier PASS DateInput-2; synced after execute + PASS (2026-07-20).

WeekPicker.userDecision: component WeekPicker: ISO week list; YYYY-Www onSelect (not skipped). Consumer API per plans/date-time-inputs.md 2026-07-20.
WeekPicker.notes: Verifier PASS DateInput-2; synced after execute + PASS (2026-07-20).

TimePicker.userDecision: component TimePicker: spinner 12/24; HH:MM onSelect. Consumer API per plans/date-time-inputs.md 2026-07-20.
TimePicker.notes: Verifier PASS DateInput-2; synced after execute + PASS (2026-07-20).

PickerPopup.userDecision: component PickerPopup + Popover/Trigger/Content/Anchor exports: Radix Popover. Consumer API per plans/date-time-inputs.md 2026-07-20.
PickerPopup.notes: Verifier PASS DateInput-2; synced after execute + PASS (2026-07-20).

ListMenu.userDecision: component ListMenu / ListMenuItem / ListMenuButton: SidebarMenu-shaped compound (ul/li/button), Tailwind + cva, no Radix (Slot for asChild). isActive + data-active; optional icon name prop or composed children; variant default | no-borders. No Astro items[] / as / isCustom / customSrc. Consumer API per plans/list-menu.md 2026-07-20.
ListMenu.notes: Implemented package + demo + docs; human accepted visual match 2026-07-20.
